description.value: You have survived things that should have ended you once already. Whatever grante dyou power still wants you alive

system.benefits: At the start of each short rest, you gain temporary HP equal to your Charisma score. These persist until your next short rest. Additionally, when you are reduced to 0 HP, you may use a [Reaction] to immediately expend your short rest Energy recovery — your Energy pool refills and you stabilize at 1 HP. You may use this once per long rest.

usage.text: Temporary HP at each short rest (passive); emergency recovery once per long rest
